about.ownerBio: With years of experience in the trades, I started EB Services to bring honest, quality craftsmanship to every project. Whether it's a small repair or a full remodel, I treat every home like my own.

testimonials.text: EB Services completely transformed our master bathroom. The attention to detail was incredible, and they finished right on schedule. We couldn't be happier with the results.
testimonials.author: [Customer Name]

testimonials.text: Finally found a contractor who shows up on time and does what they say they're going to do. Our kitchen looks amazing, and working with them was a great experience from start to finish.
testimonials.author: [Customer Name]

testimonials.text: We had a long list of repairs and improvements that had been piling up. EB Services knocked them all out efficiently and at a fair price. Highly recommend for any handyman work.
testimonials.author: [Customer Name]
